svg.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace
svg.aria-label: On-premises SQL Server replicated to Amazon RDS for SQL Server via Debezium CDC, streaming through Confluent Cloud (Kafka + Schema Registry), with the Debezium JDBC sink writing to RDS over AWS Direct Connect.
svg.text: On-prem SQL Server → Confluent Cloud → Amazon RDS for SQL Server
Near-real-time CDC replication with Debezium + the JDBC sink
